name: Wall
notes: Sits on the border between two hexes, not on a hex itself — blocks movement and line-of-sight/projectiles across that edge; Air units ignore Walls entirely. Placement only requires one existing adjacent building, not the usual two. Walls never attack — purely passive HP barriers, no contact/spike damage. Doesn't consume a population slot. A destroyed Wall disappears entirely rather than ruining, freeing its edge for a fresh build at normal cost (any material) rather than a discounted ruin-rebuild, so rebuildCost does not apply here. Wood is cheapest/weakest and Fire-vulnerable; Stone is mid (no damageReceivedModifiers entries); Steel is priciest/strongest (also none).
